title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus South Asia Partners in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus South Asia Partners:
MedPlus South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus South Asia Partners!
